description: Production-ready, zero-cost-deployable web app for Next-Gen Bio-Intelligent Architecture.

deliverables.description: Complete React project ready for deployment.
Main project documentation with agent automation notes.
Non-coder friendly deployment checklist and instructions.
LinkedIn posts and DM templates for outreach.
60-90 second demo script with time-coded voiceover lines.
Mock JSON dataset for the 3D metabolic pathway.
Mock JSON index for semantic search.

deployment.one_click_deploy: Use Vercel or Netlify dashboard to import the GitHub repository. The build command is 'npm run build' and the output directory should be left as the Next.js default.
